title: Implement other packs (03e): complete frameworks + remote/rsync + secrets/vault + platform/github
description:
Complete all 4 packs from plan 03e-packs-other.md. Currently ~5% implemented (only frameworks stub with 1 rule).

Packs to implement/complete:
- frameworks (expand): Currently has 1 combined rule (rails-db-reset) with keywords [rails, db:drop, db:reset]. Plan specifies 12 safe + 29 destructive rules covering rails, rake, manage.py, artisan, mix. Needs full expansion with ArgAt-based structured matching.
- remote.rsync: 1 safe + 4 destructive rules for rsync with --delete/--remove-source-files/etc.
- secrets.vault: 3 safe + 11 destructive rules for HashiCorp Vault operations.
- platform.github: 2 safe + 3 destructive rules for gh CLI operations.

Total: ~41 rules across 4 packs.

Create: internal/packs/remote/, internal/packs/secrets/, internal/packs/platform/ directories.
Include: Per-pack source files, golden file entries (95 planned), per-pack unit tests, pack registrations.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Reviewed by dcg-reviewer, no issues. Completed in commit b9f470f.
